steps.title: Solve the linear equation
steps.content:
Starting with $17 = 3x + 5$, subtract 5 from both sides:
$$17 - 5 = 3x + 5 - 5$$
$$12 = 3x$$
Divide both sides by 3:
$$\frac{12}{3} = \frac{3x}{3}$$
$$x = 4$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: We found exactly one value of $x$ that satisfies the equation. Since a linear equation in one variable with a non-zero coefficient on the variable produces exactly one solution, there is exactly one solution to this equation. B is correct.
